name: Indian Chicken Curry
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Tart Apple, Peeled And Diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken pieces.
2. In a pot of boiling water, cook the chicken with celery tops until fork tender (about 1 hour).
3. Drain and strain the broth; reserve.
4. Bone the chicken and cut into 1/2 inch pieces to measure about 2-1/2 cups.
5. In a skillet, melt butter over low heat.
6. Add apple, onion, and curry powder; sauté for 5 minutes, blending well.
7. Stir in raisins, reserved chicken broth, and Coca-Cola.
8. Mix flour with half-and-half until smooth.
9. Add salt and white pepper to the onion-apple mixture; stir.
10. Cook over low heat until thick and creamy, tasting for seasoning.
11. Add chicken; cover and chill overnight.
12. Reheat in a double boiler over hot water and serve on rice with condiments like grated coconut, chopped peanuts, raw onions, raisins, pickles, chutney, or lime wedges.
